curriculum.subject: Mathematics
curriculum.overallDescription: 5 units, 5 chapters, 12 topics, 12 subtopics, and 35 learning outcomes extracted through raw extraction, document-structure hierarchy building, node enrichment, normalized teaching blocks, validation, and statistics generation.
coreObjectives: Test for continuity and differentiability of a function at a point
Apply chain rule to differentiate composite functions
Differentiate inverse trigonometric functions (sin^-1 x, cos^-1 x, tan^-1 x)
Find derivatives of functions expressed in parametric forms
Determine the rate of change of quantities
Identify intervals where a function is increasing or decreasing
Apply first and second derivative tests to find local maxima and minima
Evaluate integrals using the method of substitution

activities.title: Mathematics Activities Record Keeping
activities.details: Conduct any 10 activities from the NCERT Laboratory Manual throughout the year and maintain a record. Weightage: 5 marks.

activities.title: Year End Test on Activities
activities.details: Conduct an assessment test based on the activities performed during the year end. Weightage: 3 marks.

activities.title: Viva-voce on Activities
activities.details: Oral examination regarding the activities performed. Weightage: 2 marks.

marks_distribution: Unit-IV: Vectors and Three-dimensional Geometry - 14 Marks
competency_weightage: Remembering: Exhibit memory of previously learned material by recalling facts, terms, basic concepts.
Understanding: Demonstrate understanding by organizing, comparing, translating, interpreting, giving descriptions.
Applying: Solve problems to new situations using acquired knowledge and techniques.
Analysing/Evaluating/Creating: Examine information, make judgments, compile elements in a new pattern.

bloom_levels.description: Exhibit memory of previously learned material by recalling facts, terms, basic concepts, and answers.
Demonstrate understanding of facts and ideas by organizing, comparing, translating, interpreting, giving descriptions, and stating main ideas.
Solve problems to new situations by applying acquired knowledge, facts, techniques and rules in a different way.

practical_assessment.component: Activities performed by the student throughout the year and record keeping
Assessment of the activity performed during the year end test

project_assessment.details: Pen and Paper assessment with a balance mix of Very Short Answer (VSA), Short Answer (SA), and Long Answer (LA) questions.

competency_groups.title: Relations and Functions
competency_groups.description: Understanding types of relations, equivalence relations, one-to-one and onto functions.
competencies: Identify reflexive, symmetric, transitive and equivalence relations
Determine if a function is one to one or onto

competency_groups.title: Inverse Trigonometric Functions
competency_groups.description: Understanding definition, range, domain, principal value branches, and graphs of inverse trigonometric functions.
competencies: Define inverse trigonometric functions with their domains and ranges
Identify principal value branches for sin^-1 x, cos^-1 x, tan^-1 x
Sketch graphs of inverse trigonometric functions

competency_groups.title: Matrices
competency_groups.description: Understanding concepts, operations, properties of matrices including non-commutativity and invertibility.
competencies: Identify types of matrices (zero, identity, symmetric, skew-symmetric)
Perform matrix addition, multiplication, and scalar multiplication
Demonstrate non-commutativity of matrix multiplication for order 2 square matrices
Find the inverse of a square matrix if it exists

competency_groups.title: Determinants and Applications
competency_groups.description: Understanding determinants, minors, co-factors, adjoint, inverse, and solving systems of linear equations.
competencies: Calculate determinant of a square matrix up to 3x3 order
Find area of a triangle using determinants
Determine consistency or inconsistency of a system of linear equations
Solve systems of linear equations in two or three variables using inverse matrices

competency_groups.title: Continuity and Differentiability
competency_groups.description: Understanding continuity, differentiability, chain rule, derivatives of composite/inverse trigonometric/implicit functions.
competencies: Test for continuity and differentiability of a function at a point
Apply chain rule to differentiate composite functions
Differentiate inverse trigonometric functions (sin^-1 x, cos^-1 x, tan^-1 x)
Find derivatives of implicit functions

competency_groups.title: Exponential and Logarithmic Functions Derivatives
competency_groups.description: Understanding derivatives of exponential, logarithmic functions, logarithmic differentiation, parametric forms.
competencies: Differentiate exponential and logarithmic functions
Apply logarithmic differentiation techniques
Find derivatives of functions expressed in parametric forms

competency_groups.title: Second Order Derivatives and Applications
competency_groups.description: Understanding second order derivatives, rate of change, increasing/decreasing functions, maxima/minima.
competencies: Calculate second order derivatives
Determine the rate of change of quantities
Identify intervals where a function is increasing or decreasing
Apply first and second derivative tests to find local maxima and minima

competency_groups.title: Integration Techniques
competency_groups.description: Understanding integration as inverse of differentiation, substitution, partial fractions, and parts.
competencies: Evaluate integrals using the method of substitution
Decompose rational functions into partial fractions for integration
Apply integration by parts to evaluate complex integrals

competency_groups.title: Definite Integrals and Fundamental Theorem
competency_groups.description: Understanding definite integrals, their properties, evaluation of specific types, and the Fundamental Theorem.
competencies: Evaluate standard forms like dx/(x^2+a^2), dx/sqrt(x^2-a^2), etc.
Apply basic properties of definite integrals
State and apply the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus

competency_groups.title: Area Under Curves
competency_groups.description: Understanding applications of integrals to find area under simple curves.
competencies: Calculate the area under lines, circles, parabolas, and ellipses in standard form

competency_groups.title: Differential Equations
competency_groups.description: Understanding definition, order, degree, solutions, and methods of solving differential equations.
competencies: Identify the order and degree of a differential equation
Find general and particular solutions
Solve first-order homogeneous differential equations by separation of variables

competency_groups.title: Linear Differential Equations
competency_groups.description: Understanding and solving linear differential equations of specific forms.
competencies: Solve linear differential equations of the form dy/dx + py = q

competency_groups.title: Vectors and Scalars
competency_groups.description: Understanding vectors, scalars, magnitude, direction, types of vectors.
competencies: Distinguish between vectors and scalars
Calculate magnitude and direction cosines/ratios of a vector

competency_groups.title: Vector Operations
competency_groups.description: Understanding addition, scalar multiplication, position vectors.
competencies: Perform vector addition and scalar multiplication

competency_groups.title: Dot and Cross Products
competency_groups.description: Understanding scalar (dot) product and vector (cross) product properties.
competencies: Calculate the dot product of two vectors

competency_groups.title: Three-Dimensional Geometry - Lines
competency_groups.description: Understanding direction ratios, equations of lines (Cartesian/Vector), skew lines.
competencies: Find direction cosines and ratios for a line joining two points

competency_groups.title: Distance Between Lines
competency_groups.description: Understanding shortest distance between skew lines.
competencies: Calculate the shortest distance between two skew lines

competency_groups.title: Angle Between Lines
competency_groups.description: Understanding the angle between two lines.
competencies: Calculate the angle between two given lines

competency_groups.title: Linear Programming Concepts
competency_groups.description: Understanding constraints, objective function, optimization.
competencies: Identify feasible and infeasible regions

competency_groups.title: Graphical Solution of LPP
competency_groups.description: Understanding graphical method for solving linear programming problems.
competencies: Solve simple linear programming problems in two variables using the graphical method

competency_groups.title: Probability Concepts
competency_groups.description: Understanding conditional probability, independent events.
competencies: Calculate probabilities of independent and dependent events

competency_groups.title: Theorems in Probability
competency_groups.description: Understanding multiplication theorem, total probability, Bayes' theorem.
competencies: Apply the multiplication theorem on probability

competency_groups.title: Bayes' Theorem and Total Probability
competency_groups.description: Understanding total probability and Bayes' theorem applications.
competencies: Apply the law of total probability

competency_groups.title: Bayes' Theorem Application
competency_groups.description: Understanding and applying Bayes' theorem.
competencies: Apply Bayes' theorem to solve probability problems
